categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Application opened to a list/overview screen with an affordance to create a new item; optionally requires a target identifier (e.g., a recipient or reference value) and content
abstract_steps: Launch the application and navigate to the target list screen
Invoke the create-new-item affordance (floating action button, empty-state CTA, or explicit 'Create' entry)
Provide required identifier in the dedicated field
Confirm identifier (if a confirm control exists) before entering body
Focus each required input field in order and enter the corresponding value
Enter body content in the dedicated body field
Confirm by activating the primary commit/submit control
Verify the new item appears in the list and is persisted
failure_modes: Committing before all required fields are filled
Typing into an unfocused field
Missing the create affordance because it is off-screen or behind a tab
A required interface element is unavailable or cannot be located, rendering the action infeasible
Content accidentally placed in identifier field
Skipping confirm step so body field never activates
verification_checklist: New item's identifier is visible in the list view
No error/validation banner present
Return to list state (not still in editor)
Identifier correctly attached to the new item
Body text matches request verbatim
Item appears in the main list after creation

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY_FIELD_WITH_ENUM_LABEL
categories.precondition: Editor form open with a field that has an associated enum label selector
abstract_steps: Fill primary value field with input_text
Activate the adjacent label dropdown/selector
Choose the desired label from the option list
Confirm the label field reflects the chosen value
failure_modes: Clicking the value field instead of the dropdown trigger
Selecting wrong option because list indices shift after opening
verification_checklist: Label field text matches requested value
Value field retained its entered text

categories.name: CREATE_DRAFT_WITHOUT_COMMIT
categories.precondition: Editor form reachable and task specifies not to persist
abstract_steps: Populate all specified fields
Adjust any optional attributes (labels/types) as specified
Stop before invoking the primary commit control
Declare task complete while editor still shows draft state
failure_modes: Accidentally activating the primary commit control
Navigating away and losing the draft
verification_checklist: All requested values are visible in their fields
Editor screen is still active (not returned to list)
No success confirmation toast appeared

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO_APP
categories.precondition: Launcher, a different application, or an unrelated screen is currently in the foreground
abstract_steps: Attempt direct app launch by name or identify the target app icon
If unavailable, open the application list and locate it via scrolling or a lookup affordance
If app opens to a non-target subsection, switch tabs/drawer to reach target section
If truly absent, surface an infeasibility status
failure_modes: App icon not on current launcher page
Landing on wrong tab inside a multi-tab app
Confusing a visually-similar app for the target
Prematurely reporting infeasibility before trying the application list
verification_checklist: Target section header/title visible
Expected primary affordances (e.g., create button) present
Foreground window belongs to the intended app
A recognizable landing screen of that app is visible

categories.name: REPLY_TO_ENTITY
categories.precondition: Application open to a list of existing conversations/entities; target entity identifiable by name or identifier
abstract_steps: Launch the application
Locate the target entity row in the list (scrolling or using a lookup affordance if needed)
Open the entity detail/thread
Focus the reply/compose input
Enter the requested text
Trigger the send/submit control
Verify the new entry appears attributed to the user
failure_modes: Selecting wrong entity when multiple similar names exist
Typing into the header/recipient field instead of the body
Forgetting to press send after entering text
verification_checklist: Sent content string matches exactly (including punctuation)
New outgoing item visible in the correct thread
Input field is cleared after submission with zero residual draft content

categories.name: TRANSFER_CONTENT_BETWEEN_ENTITIES
categories.precondition: Source item contains text to forward; target entity might already have an existing thread/record or might require creating one
abstract_steps: Open source item and select the desired text (long-press)
Copy text to clipboard via the selection action bar
Navigate back to the list of entities
Open or create the target entity's thread/record, ensuring it is distinct from the source thread
Focus the body input and insert the clipboard contents via the standard insertion gesture
Submit
Verify the transferred text appears attributed to the user within the target thread
failure_modes: Sending the content back into the source thread instead of the target
Pasting into an identifier field, corrupting the recipient
Clipboard ends up empty because the copy action was never confirmed
verification_checklist: Target entity correctly selected
Inserted text exactly equals the original
Outgoing item is visible within the target entity's thread rather than the source's

categories.name: REPEAT_PREVIOUS_ACTION
categories.precondition: A prior item/action exists and user wants to repeat it
abstract_steps: Open the item/thread containing the original
Look for an explicit repeat/resend affordance in context menu or overflow
If absent, capture original text (read or copy)
Re-enter the text via the standard create path and submit it once more
failure_modes: Assuming a dedicated repeat control exists when the interface lacks one
Declaring task infeasible without trying the manual re-entry workaround
Repeating from the wrong item (e.g., a received vs sent one)
verification_checklist: A second outgoing copy of the identical text exists
Timestamp of new copy is after the original
Original item remains intact and has been preserved without accidental removal
